creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 194131
Diff between py-matrix-synapse 0.28.1 and 0.31.1

This patch should update the net-im/py-matrix-synapse port from 0.28.1 to 0.31.1. The latter version fixes a security issue (see [1]) and introduces net-mgmt/py-prometheus-client (see [2]) as a new dependency. Tested the new port on my instance and things seem to work fine[tm].

I've also added my email-address as maintainer and would supply updates in the future if that's ok. 

Cheers,
Sascha


[1] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v0.31.1
[2] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v0.31.0
